title: Royal Enfield is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Royal Enfield is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Royal Enfield is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Royal Enfield:
Royal Enfield is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Royal Enfield!
